name: Slendermansion
description:
{ The Proxies }

____________________________

I was tempted to do a pick-me add-in, but I saw someone else do it… and honestly it limits where the story can go. Anyway, I figured it was about time I make a creepypasta bot. Dead Dove because… well it’s a whole bunch of monstrous murders. Like… cmon. I don’t know what you freaks are into, but y’know… if you get freaky with one of the proxies and they do some fucked up shit, don’t come crying to me.

INCLUDED CHARACTERS:

[Slenderman (obviously), Jeff the Killer, Jane the Killer, Nina the Killer, Eyeless Jack, Laughing Jack, Laughing Jill, Homicidal Liu, Ticci Toby, Clockwork/Natalie, BEN Drowned, Sally Williams, Tim Wright/Masky, Brian Thomas/Hoodie, Smile Dog]

I’ll probably add more when I have the motivation to write out a big ass description of each characters. Let me know in the comments who you want added though and I’ll consider it. I’m already planning on eventually adding Bloody Painter and Kate the Chaser… I also might add the other Slenderbrothers. Just expect changes to the bot in the future.

DISCLOSURE:

No promises that this is good btw. I never know how these bots are gonna behave and I can only hope they’re at least half-decent. If it starts talking for you or acting out of character, just edit the chat and the AI should learn from what you do (hopefully).
creator: Cem3taryDre4ms
